title: Custom End Portals
description: Customize the End Portals in Strongholds!
body:
This mod allows modpack creators to configure the End Portals in Strongholds to take a unique set of items!

For example, you could make an End Portal that requires 6 diamonds and 6 honeycomb! (Not that you would, that sounds awful.)
Each portal frame is now its own unique block type, meaning you can easily give each one its own texture and model! By default, the models look exactly the same as the vanilla end portal frames, except with a new top. There's an individual texture file to each of the frame's tops by default, too. (`endportallock:block/custom_end_portal_frame_#_empty` and `endportallock:block/custom_end_portal_frame_#_filled`)

To modify what items each portal frame takes, look in the config file for the mod, `config/endportallock.json`.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/Z8Z714G8U7)
